headline: With $100 Oil Expected, The S&P 500 Turns Positive Pre-Market | GSPC
summary: S&P 500 futures are pointing +0.37% higher ahead of Friday’s open, a modest recovery attempt after the index shed 1.52% on Thursday flirts with $100 a barrel pricing. The session’s tentative optimism rests on a complicated foundation: energy prices that are surging toward levels not seen since 2022, geopolitical disruption in the Strait of Hormuz, ... With $100 Oil Expected, The S&P 500 Turns Positive Pre-Market | GSPC

headline: Dow Inc. (DOW) Moves 9.3% Higher: Will This Strength Last?
summary: Dow Inc. (DOW) witnessed a jump in share price last session on above-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions for the stock doesn't suggest further strength down the road.

headline: Dow Inc. (DOW) Surges 9.3% as Citi Hikes Price Target by 43%
summary: Dow Inc. (NYSE:DOW) is one of the 10 Stock Winners in a Brutal Market. Dow saw its share prices jump by 9.34 percent on Thursday to close at $37.58 apiece, after Citigroup turned bullish for its stock, raising its rating and price target by 43 percent. In a market report on the same day, Citigroup […]
